subject: [CONSUL] Uses new tpls for repos / images
commit_message:
[CONSUL] Uses new tpls for repos / images

This commit makes Consul chart to use the new generator for repositories and
images.

Issue-ID: OOM-2364
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Id46ed756b1f975695585e873c8e13accf3b1d7ca

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> @Morgan
> Any idea on the nature of basic_network failure?

here it is a dahboard issue
because both
basic_network and basic_cnf are PASS if you click on the link..

so it is only a dashboard issue, maybe results were not pushed in the DB
the dashboard status is built dynamically based on what can be retrieved from the DB
so artifacts can be good but if DB status is not good => dashboard will be like that
usually it is sync..
2 possible reasons
- results were not pushed
- results were pished with the same CI id, dashboard take the first one (faulty)
need to dig a little bit..
